title: Address @ts-ignore suppressions in platform-mcp-adapter
summary: platform-mcp-adapter.ts has 3 instances of @ts-ignore for dynamic imports. These bypass type checking and could lead to type mismatches in admin-api integration.
acceptance: Remove or justify each @ts-ignore with documentation
Implement proper type guards for dynamic imports
Add runtime validation for imported types
Update TypeScript config if needed for dynamic import typing
impact: Medium - improves type safety and prevents runtime errors
notes: Dynamic imports avoid static dependency but sacrifice compile-time safety. Consider using type assertions with runtime validation instead.
